name: WebMessage
columns: ProfileId INT NOT NULL FK→Profiles (CASCADE DELETE)
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — used in DeleteSmsGroupAsync webhook logic (F001). Dedicated Angular admin module web-messages.
green_ai_note: EditedWebMessageId self-ref = edit creates new draft. TypeId FK must be modelled. Status int = own FSM.

name: SmsGroupSchedule
columns: SmsGroupId BIGINT NOT NULL FK→SmsGroups (CASCADE DELETE)
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — recurrence config for scheduled broadcasts. Angular admin module scheduled-broadcasts.
green_ai_note: IntervalJson = recurrence stored as JSON blob, NOT RRULE/iCal. No IsActive column — state inferred from SmsGroup. Green-ai must decide: keep JSON or normalize.

name: SmsGroupScheduleException
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — skip or reschedule a specific occurrence.
green_ai_note: NewDate NULL = skip this occurrence. NewDate set = reschedule to that date. LocalTime override per exception.

name: SmsArchivedLog
columns: Id INT NOT NULL PK (NOT IDENTITY — preserves original SmsLogs.Id)
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — archival table for completed broadcasts.
green_ai_note: PK is NOT IDENTITY — mirrors original SmsLogs.Id. GatewayProvider is newer field separate from GatewayId. Cross-channel: contains both SMS and Email fields (mirrors SmsLogs).

name: WebhookRegistration
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — referenced in B007 (delete webhook) and B016 (status import webhook). API-only feature (no UI labels).
green_ai_note: PK is GUID, not INT. CustomerId scope (not ProfileId). AlarmEmails for failure notification. EventType INT enum — values must be sourced from code.

name: WebhookMessage
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — outgoing webhook delivery tracking.
green_ai_note: No WebhookRegistrationId FK on this table — link to registration is on WebhookMessageSendAttempts. DateFailedUtc for permanent failure tracking.

name: WebhookMessageSendAttempt
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — individual HTTP attempt per message per registration.
green_ai_note: WebhookRegistrationId is GUID FK here. One message can be attempted against multiple registrations.

name: ConversationPhoneNumber
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — inbound number for two-way SMS. Angular top-level sms-conversations module.
green_ai_note: Profile mapping is many-to-many via ConversationPhoneNumberProfileMappings (no direct ProfileId here). GatewayProvider = which gateway receives inbound.

name: ConversationPhoneNumberProfileMapping
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — one inbound number shared across multiple profiles.
green_ai_note: No CASCADE DELETE declared — cleanup must be explicit.

name: Conversation
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — thread grouping for two-way SMS.
green_ai_note: No ProfileId directly — inferred through ConversationPhoneNumber→ProfileMapping. No DateCreatedUtc on this table. Unread flag for UI badge.

name: ConversationMessage
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — individual message in thread.
green_ai_note: SmsLogId is INT (not BIGINT) — same overflow risk as BR014. No Direction column — direction inferred from SmsLogId NULL (inbound) vs set (outbound). Status int = delivery state.

name: Subscription
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
DateLastUpdatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Lookup pipeline source (F006: LookupSubscriptionsCommand, LookupOwnerSubscriptionsCommand). 335 git commits = most actively developed domain.
green_ai_note: IdentifierKey = Kvhx-based address key used to match subscriptions to lookup. Blocked vs Deleted are separate states. DateNotInPhonenumbersUtc = phone absent from registry (churn signal).
scope_note: Subscription is a Lookup DATA SOURCE. Architect must decide: own domain or part of broadcast domain?

name: SubscriptionSupplyNumber
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
DateLastModifiedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — supply-number based subscriptions. F006 LookupSupplyNumbersSubscriptionsCommand. B017 merge-field supply branch.
green_ai_note: Keyed on SupplyNumber string (not address Kvhx). Alias = human-readable supply point name for merge-field resolution.

name: SmsGroupApprovalRequest
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — the unapproved/approval flow. A broadcast must be approved before sending.
green_ai_note: ApprovedByUserId NULL = pending. ApprovedUTC NULL = not approved yet. No rejection state in DB — binary: pending or approved. SmsGroupId is INT here (vs BIGINT in SmsGroups) — potential type mismatch.

name: SmsGroupApprover
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — defines who can approve broadcasts per profile.
green_ai_note: Column typo: RecieveNotification (should be ReceiveNotification). Green-ai should correct spelling.

name: Warning
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — externally triggered broadcast source (weather, critical infrastructure).
green_ai_note: Status FSM: New=0, FirstRetry=1, SecondRetry=2, Failed=3, InProgress=4..6, Postponed=7/9, Done=10. SourceRef = external system ref. Serial = deduplication key.

name: WarningType
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — category of warning, restricts which profiles can use it.
green_ai_note: Name is a translation key (localization-aware). SendAsSingleMessages=false: all recipients get one grouped message.

name: WarningTemplate
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Profile+WarningType to Template + send rules.
green_ai_note: TestMode defaults to 1 (safe-off, same pattern as BR019). HandleHour = time of day to process. MaxAgeInHours = reject stale warnings.

name: Enrollment
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — VERIFIED Lookup data source: F006 LookupEnrollmentsCommand + LookupOwnerEnrollmentsCommand.
green_ai_note: Blocked is separate from soft-delete. SenderId is GUID FK to Senders (the Enrollment app's profile concept). EnrolleeAddressId → EnrolleeAddresses (address-centric).

name: Prospect
columns: CustomerId INT NULL (NULL until converted to Customer)
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE (scope=INTERNAL) — internal sales CRM. Angular pipeline module.
green_ai_note: CustomerId NULL until prospect converts. EconomicId = integration with e-conomic billing. Separate domain from broadcast/messaging.

name: Statstidende
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — external legal notification integration (Danish official gazette: death estates, insolvency, foreclosures).
green_ai_note: ServiceName = Statstidende API endpoint identifier. MessageTypePublicKey + AddressFieldGroupPublicKey = API integration keys. Email-based (not SMS pipeline). Separate from broadcast pipeline.

name: StatstidendeData
columns: StatstidendeId INT NOT NULL FK→Statstidende (CASCADE DELETE+UPDATE)
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — incoming legal notices with address data for lookup.
green_ai_note: JsonObject = raw Statstidende API payload. SendtUtc NULL = pending send. KvhxDawa vs Kvhx = two address keys (DAWA vs legacy).

name: StatstidendeReceiver
columns: CustomerId INT NOT NULL FK→Customers (CASCADE DELETE)
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — named email recipients for Statstidende notifications.
green_ai_note: Email allows 1000 chars — likely semicolon-separated multiple addresses.

name: StatstidendeSubscription
columns: StatstidendeReceiverId INT NOT NULL FK→StatstidendeReceivers (CASCADE DELETE)
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — links a Profile to a Statstidende category and a named receiver.
green_ai_note: Composite PK prevents duplicate subscriptions per profile+category+receiver.

name: LookupSelection
description: In-memory pipeline type. Represents a user targeting criterion passed to the Lookup pipeline. Base interface ISelection with subtypes.
interface_hierarchy: IPhoneSelection extends INamedSelection: int? PhoneCode, long? PhoneNumber
AddressFilterSelection: int ZipCode, string? Street, int? FromNumber, int? ToNumber, bool? EvenOdd, string? Letter, string? Floor, string? Door, int? Meters
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — persisted form is SmsGroupItems. Defines the broadcast creation API contract.

name: LookupOrigin
description: In-memory pipeline type. An entity causing the message to be sent. Produced by ILookupExpander from Selections.
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Origin = broadcast reason/cause. Critical for why-was-this-sent reporting.

name: LookupTarget
description: In-memory pipeline type. Pairing of a specific recipient with a specific Origin. Produced by ILookupEnricher.EnrichAsync().
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Target is the join between recipient identity and message origin.

name: LookupDeliverable
description: In-memory pipeline type. A channel-specific message that COULD be sent. Filtered deliverables are marked with FilterReason, not silently removed.
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Deliverable maps to a DeliveryRecord row. FilterReason should be added as RejectionReason column in green-ai DeliveryRecord.

name: Customer
columns: PublicId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL DEFAULT newid()
DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — top-level tenant entity. All domain tables reference CustomerId.
green_ai_note: PublicId (GUID) = external-facing identity, Id = internal FK. MonthToDeleteBroadcast + MonthToDeleteMessages = per-customer data retention policy. ScimTokenUUID = SCIM provisioning. VoiceDeliveryWindowStart/End = time-of-day gate for voice calls. Active vs Deleted are separate states.

name: Profile
columns: PublicId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL DEFAULT newid()
DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — fundamental authorization and configuration scope. Every broadcast/lookup operation is Profile-scoped.
green_ai_note: LookupMaxNumbers is enforced in F006 filter pipeline (BR filter). RoleGroupId = template used when creating Profile. EboksStrategy int = which e-Boks delivery strategy to use. Hidden = profile exists but not visible in UI. LookupMaxNumbers NULL = no cap.

name: CustomerAccount
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — pricing contract per customer. One-to-one with Customer.
green_ai_note: Per-channel pricing (SMS, email, voice, eBoks, lookup). SubscriptionPriceIncreaseUTC = scheduled future price change. InvoiceCycle = monthly/quarterly etc. CustomerAccountType = contract type string (not enum).

name: ProfileRole
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — feature flags and permission system. Referenced throughout domain (B001 permission gates, F006 filter, WarningTypes).
green_ai_note: PublicVisible = shown in self-service. SuperAdminVisible = only super-admins see it. ProfileRoleCategoryId groups roles for UI display. No IsEnabled column — presence in ProfileRoleMappings = enabled.

name: ProfileRoleMapping
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — many-to-many: which roles are enabled for a profile.
green_ai_note: AddedManuallyDateUtc NULL = role was added via RoleGroup template (not manually). NOCHECK constraints declared — FK enforcement is disabled in prod. Green-ai should enforce properly.

name: ProfileRolePrice
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — default per-country price for a role feature.
green_ai_note: Per-country pricing (DK, NO, SE, FI). Can be overridden per customer via CustomerProfileRolePrices.

name: CustomerProfileRolePrice
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — customer-specific role price override.
green_ai_note: Overrides ProfileRolePrices for a specific customer. No CountryId here — currency string encodes country implicitly.

name: ProfileRoleGroup
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — role template used when creating a new Profile.
green_ai_note: Country-specific templates (DK/NO/SE/FI). OrderBy for UI display. Referenced from Profiles.RoleGroupId.

name: ProfileRolesInGroup
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — many-to-many: which roles are in a group template.
green_ai_note: No CASCADE DELETE declared. When a group is used to create a Profile, roles are copied into ProfileRoleMappings with AddedManuallyDateUtc=NULL.

name: CustomerLog
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — audit trail for account/pricing changes.
green_ai_note: Free-text Message — no structured event type. UserId = who made the change. Used by sales/admin staff.

name: CustomerNote
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — CRM notes by sales/admin staff.
green_ai_note: Soft-delete via DateDeletedUtc. CreatedByUser + DeletedByUser = full audit. No EditedBy — notes are immutable once created.

name: CustomerApiKey
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — customer-level API access keys.
green_ai_note: Type string categorizes the key (not an enum). Secret NULL = key-only auth (no HMAC). Compare with ProfileApiKeys (profile-scoped).

name: ProfileApiKey
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — profile-level API access keys.
green_ai_note: Same structure as CustomerApiKeys but Profile-scoped.

name: CustomerFtpSettings
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — FTP/SFTP integration config for customer.
green_ai_note: Password stored as NVARCHAR (plaintext or encrypted — unclear from schema). PrivateKey for SFTP key auth. ServerType int = FTP vs SFTP. AllowOfficeHoursImport = time-window gate for data imports.

name: CustomerSamlSettings
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — SAML2 SSO per customer.
green_ai_note: One record per customer. EmailClaim = SAML attribute name to use as email identity. MetadataUrl = IdP metadata endpoint.

name: CustomerSubscriptionSettings
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — customer-specific subscription widget configuration (texts, behaviour).
green_ai_note: UNIQUE constraint on CustomerId — one-to-one with Customer. All SubscriptionModule* = iframe widget configuration texts for the customer's public sign-up page. NotificationActive = whether to send periodic digest to staff.

name: CustomerUserRoleMapping
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — which user roles are available/default for a customer.
green_ai_note: UserRoleId references user-level roles (UserRoles table — not the same as ProfileRoles). DefaultSelected = pre-checked in role assignment UI.

name: StandardReceiver
columns: Name NVARCHAR(100) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — core recipient entity. Customer-scoped (not shared). IsManaged=SCIM-managed. Phone is BIGINT (not combined with PhoneCode in column).
green_ai_note: Phone stored as BIGINT separate from PhoneCode INT. Multiple phone numbers via StandardReceiverPhoneNumbers. SCIM integration via ScimExternalId. Trusted recipient type (bypasses RobinsonCheck + LookupMaxNumbers).

name: StandardReceiverGroup
columns: Name NVARCHAR(100) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — group aggregate. IsActiveForSubscription = keyword-join enabled. FtpPath = SFTP import. DataImportSavedConfigurationId links to import config. ReceiptEmail for group notifications.
green_ai_note: FK to Customers has NOCHECK. DataImportSavedConfigurationId = cross-domain link to import system. Weather Warning groups use StandardReceiverGroupKeywords with WeatherWarning=1.

name: StandardReceiverGroupMapping
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — many-to-many receiver-group relation. Both FKs have NOCHECK.
green_ai_note: Both FK constraints NOCHECK. Green-ai must enforce referential integrity in application layer.

name: StandardReceiverProfileMapping
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — per-profile visibility + default selection. SelectedDefault = pre-selected in broadcast wizard. SendReport = delivery report sent to receiver.
green_ai_note: Both FK NOCHECK. SelectedDefault controls wizard pre-selection. SendReport is per-mapping (not per-receiver).

name: StandardReceiverGroupProfileMapping
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — per-profile group visibility + default selection. Mirrors StandardReceiverProfileMapping pattern for groups.
green_ai_note: Both FK NOCHECK (duplicate NOCHECK statements in sql file — likely migration artifact). SelectedDefault = group pre-selected in wizard.

name: StandardReceiverGroupKeyword
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — SMS subscribe/unsubscribe via keyword. ReceiverNumber DEFAULT 451204 = hardcoded to 1204 number (Odinsbro uses 1919). WeatherWarning flag = special zip-code subscription flow.
green_ai_note: ReceiverNumber DEFAULT hardcoded to 451204 — green-ai should make this configurable. WeatherWarning=1 triggers zip-code special flow. Messages (AddedMessage/CancelledMessage) are per-keyword customizable confirmation texts.

name: StandardReceiverGroupDistributionPhoneNumber
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — inbound SMS to this number broadcasts to all group members. Both IDs nullable = phone number can be profile-level or group-level.
green_ai_note: Both FK NOCHECK. Both ProfileId and StandardReceiverGroupId are nullable — one or both may be set. Inbound SMS routing to group broadcast.

name: StandardReceiverPhoneNumber
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — multiple phone numbers per receiver. PhoneNumberType + UsedFor = enums (type and purpose of number).
green_ai_note: Extension table for StandardReceivers.Phone (which holds primary number). PhoneNumberType and UsedFor are INT enums — enum values unknown from DB schema alone.

name: StandardReceiverGroupGroupMapping
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — group-of-groups (nested groups). No FK constraints defined in DDL.
green_ai_note: No FK constraints in DDL (unlike other mapping tables). Self-referential group containment. Green-ai must handle recursion/depth limit.

name: StandardReceiverCustomerSettings
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — customer-level customization of subscription confirmation texts. UNIQUE on CustomerId = one-to-one with Customer.
green_ai_note: Max 1530 chars for receipt texts (SMS multi-part limit consideration). UNIQUE index on CustomerId. Texts are per-customer overrides of default confirmation messages.

name: DataImportFile
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — central import file record. Status INT = import state FSM. ErrorsJson + ImportResultJson = structured feedback. ImportSettingsJson = per-file importer config. NOTE: DB columns extend wiki spec (wiki shows Purpose column, DB has ImportFormat instead).
green_ai_note: Wiki spec differs from actual DB: Purpose column not in DB (ImportFormat is). 19 columns vs 6 in wiki. DateInsertStartUtc/DateInsertedUtc = two-phase insert tracking. Soft-delete via DateDeletedUtc.

name: DataImportFileColumnMapping
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — maps source file columns to domain fields. SettingsJson = per-mapping configuration. Field NULL = unmapped column (skipped).
green_ai_note: Field nullable = column explicitly unmapped. SettingsJson encodes column-level transform/parse settings.

name: DataImportFileRow
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — intermediate JSON storage per row (stage between file read and domain insert). Covering index on FileId includes SourceRowNumber+Json for bulk read.
green_ai_note: Intermediate staging table. Json = row serialized as JSON after pre-validation. Bulk-read optimized via covering index. Two indexes: one on FileId only, one covering all columns.

name: DataImportSavedConfiguration
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — reusable named import configuration per customer. Purpose INT + Format INT = enums. Referenced by StandardReceiverGroups.DataImportSavedConfigurationId.
green_ai_note: Cross-domain link: StandardReceiverGroups references this table for SFTP-automated import. Purpose and Format are INT enums — values unknown from DB schema alone. ImportSettings = JSON blob for importer config.

name: DataImportSavedConfigurationColumnMapping
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — saved column mappings for reusable configurations. Same structure as DataImportFileColumnMappings but scoped to saved config, not per-file.
green_ai_note: No FK constraint in DDL (unlike DataImportFileColumnMappings which has FK). ConfigurationId referential integrity must be enforced in application layer.

name: ProspectContactPerson
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — contacts for a prospect (billing, technical, etc.). FK to ContactPersonTypes enum table.
green_ai_note: ContactPersonTypeId is FK to ContactPersonTypes enum. Multiple contacts per prospect. Phone stored as BIGINT separate from PhoneCode.

name: ProspectCustomerAccount
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — billing account pre-setup for prospect. Soft-delete via DateDeletedUtc.
green_ai_note: One-to-one with Prospect (wiki class diagram shows composition). Created as part of pre-sale setup.

name: ProspectProduct
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — planned product purchases for a prospect at negotiated price. Price type is MONEY.
green_ai_note: Price is per-prospect negotiated price (not list price). Links to Products table (external to Pipeline domain).

name: ProspectUserRoleMapping
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — pre-configures which user roles will be available when prospect converts to customer. DefaultSelected = pre-ticked in wizard.
green_ai_note: No FK constraints in DDL. DefaultSelected DEFAULT 1 = all mappings pre-selected by default. Drives role setup at customer creation time.

name: ProcessTaskTemplate
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — template defining a step in an onboarding or offboarding process. CountryId scoped. Type = process category (onboarding/cancellation/etc.).
green_ai_note: TranslationKey = localization key for task name. Type is free-text NVARCHAR (not DB enum). Used across multiple process types: customer creation, cancellation, price-change notifications.

name: ProcessTask
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — a concrete task instance for a Prospect or Customer. SubjectId is polymorphic (ProspectId or CustomerId). DateCompletedUtc NULL = incomplete.
green_ai_note: SubjectId POLYMORPHIC — refs either Prospect or Customer determined by Type on ProcessTaskTemplate (no FK). DateDeadlineUtc is DATE not DATETIME. Comment = support staff notes per task.

name: Address
columns: Kvhx NVARCHAR(36) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI — CLUSTERED PK (string!)
City NVARCHAR(100) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — core entity. PK is Kvhx string (NOT Id INT). Soft-delete via DateDeletedUtc. OriginCode: 0=phone import, 1=DAWA adgangsadresse, 2=DAWA address, 21=PostnummerService, 22=Lantmateriet. 9 query-optimized indexes.
green_ai_note: PK is Kvhx (string NVARCHAR(36)) — all FKs reference Kvhx not Id. Kvh = KVHX without the X suffix used for right-to-be-forgotten index. TaxeringId = Swedish property tax ID. AddressType INT enum unknown from DDL alone.

name: AddressGeography
columns: Kvhx NVARCHAR(36) NOT NULL FK->Addresses (CASCADE DELETE+UPDATE)
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — spatial geography for address. Separated from Addresses for spatial index performance. SQL Server geography type with spatial index.
green_ai_note: Spatial index SIX_AddressGeographies_Geo on [Geo]. CASCADE delete/update from Addresses. Used for proximity/polygon/spatial queries. Separate table avoids spatial index impact on bulk address updates.

name: AddressStreet
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — named road section within a single zip code. UNIQUE index on (CountryId, ZipCode, Name). One street per zip code — streets spanning multiple zips = multiple records with same name.
green_ai_note: Name can be NULL. Physical streets crossing zip codes = multiple Street entities per wiki. UNIQUE: (CountryId, ZipCode, Name).

name: AddressStreetCode
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — municipality-specific code for a street. A street crossing multiple municipalities has one StreetCode per municipality. Index on (MunicipalityCode, Streetcode) INCLUDE StreetId.
green_ai_note: Column name is Streetcode (lowercase c) though entity uses StreetCode. Streets crossing multiple municipalities get one record per municipality. This is how Addresses.StreetCode resolves to a street + municipality.

name: AddressStreetAlias
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — zero or one alias per street. Used for Finnish addresses with Swedish name alongside Finnish name.
green_ai_note: Wiki says max one alias per street — no UNIQUE constraint in DDL. Covering index: StreetId INCLUDES Alias.

name: AddressOwner
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — property owner (DK: Datafordeleren). Kvhx = property address. OwnerAddressKvhx = owner residence. CompanyRegistrationId = CVR for business owners.
green_ai_note: DK-specific. EsrPropertyId + PropertyOwnersId = Datafordeleren IDs. IsDoubled = duplicate detection flag. Kvhx nullable (owner may not have matched address). Indexes: CVR, by-property, by-owner.

name: Municipality
columns: DateLastUpdatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — reference table for municipality codes. CountryId DEFAULT 0 = legacy. Used as discriminator across all address tables.
green_ai_note: CountryId default 0 = historical; old records may have 0. No UNIQUE constraint on MunicipalityCode in DDL (could span countries). Region = DK: Syddanmark etc.

name: Country
columns: Name NVARCHAR(100) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — reference table. 4 active: DK, SE, FI, NO. PhoneCode = country dialing code (+45 etc.). STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE=ON on PK.
green_ai_note: CountryId is primary system discriminator across all address tables. Green-ai should model CountryId as strongly-typed value object. PhoneCode here = country calling code (context differs from StandardReceivers.PhoneCode = subscriber phone prefix).

name: AddressBfeToLocalId
columns: LocationLookedUpUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — DK cache: maps BFE property numbers to DAWA LocalIds. NoResult=1 = looked up, nothing found. BygningPaaFremmedGrund = building on foreign ground (special DK cadastral).
green_ai_note: Cache prevents redundant Datafordeleren→DAWA API calls. BygningPaaFremmedGrund = DK legal concept: building independent of land ownership. Index on HousenumberLocationId.

name: AddressBfeExclusion
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — DK exclusion list for BFE numbers to skip in owner lookup.
green_ai_note: SamletFastEjendomBFEnummer = parent composite property. Sub-parcels of composite properties are excluded from individual owner lookup.

name: AddressOwnerST
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — older owner import staging table (parallel to Address_ST_Owners which is newer). Results promoted to AddressOwners.
green_ai_note: Older of two owner staging tables. Same structure as AddressOwners (with COLLATE on OwnerName). AddressOwnersST_IsDoubled index. EsrPropertyId = ESR system ID.

name: AddressSTOwner
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — newer Datafordeleren owner staging. ProcessingId = batch run ID. OwnerChangeExportedUtc tracks delta export. Indexes for change-export workflow.
green_ai_note: ProcessingId groups records from same import run. OwnerForholdsKode + OwnerPartTaeller/Naevner = DK legal ownership fraction. Results promoted to AddressOwners. Newer than AddressOwnersST.

name: AddressKvhxChange
columns: OldKvhx NVARCHAR(36) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
NewKvhx NVARCHAR(36) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — tracks KVHX rename events. Used to migrate SmsGroup memberships and subscriptions from old to new Kvhx. DateChangedUtc = downstream migration completed.
green_ai_note: Source INT = import origin enum. Critical for subscription/group data integrity when addresses are renumbered. File was AddressesKvhxChanges.sql but table is AddressKvhxChanges.

name: AddressCorrection
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
DateEditedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
Note NVARCHAR(MAX) NOT NULL DEFAULT empty-string
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — manual address data corrections with approval workflow. Approved DEFAULT 1 = auto-approved. CreatedByUserId DEFAULT 5168 = system user.
green_ai_note: Hardcoded UserId 5168 = system/admin default. All fields nullable except CountryId — partial corrections allowed. Approved=0 = correction pending review.

name: AddressImportKvhxLog
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — tracks addresses that changed during import and need downstream processing. UnhandledCount = retry counter. DateHandledUtc NULL = pending.
green_ai_note: Import queue table. UnhandledCount increments on failed processing. DateHandledUtc NULL = needs downstream processing (subscriptions/groups). Index on CountryId+Kvhx+ExtUUID.

name: AddressImportKvhxLogAffectedKvhx
columns: DateCreatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — the concrete old→new Kvhx mappings discovered during import. One parent log → multiple affected Kvhx pairs.
green_ai_note: Relates to ADO work item #9312. Stores old→new mappings for downstream migration of subscriptions/groups after address renaming.

name: AddressSwedishProperty
columns: Kvhx NVARCHAR(36) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — SE: maps Lantmateriet ObjectIdentity (GUID) to Kvhx. Used for Swedish owner lookup.
green_ai_note: ObjectIdentity = Lantmateriet property GUID. Per-customer API keys used for Lantmateriet (wiki). Simple mapping table.

name: AddressVirtualMarking
columns: Kvhx NVARCHAR(36) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — marks addresses as virtual (no physical delivery point). Purpose not fully described in wiki.
green_ai_note: Likely Robinson-list equivalent or delivery-exclusion marker for addresses that exist in registry but have no physical location. Indexed on Kvhx.

name: AddressExportNorwegianStatistics
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — audit/statistics per municipal export run to Framweb/Varsling24. Counts per entity type per municipality per export.
green_ai_note: Audit trail for Norwegian Framweb export (Varsling24). One row per municipality per export run. Monitors data completeness.

name: AddressNorwegianProperty
columns: DateUpdatedUtc DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT getutcdate()
PropertyId NVARCHAR(30) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — NO operational property record (post-import, normalized). Spatial indexes for Area polygon queries. PropertyId = Norwegian cadastral ID. IsRegistered = in Matrikkel.
green_ai_note: Derived from AddressImportNorwegianProperties. Has spatial indexes (SIX_*_Area). PlotUnitId/UUID connect to plot system. Soft-delete via DateDeletedUtc.

name: AddressNorwegianPropertyAddress
columns: Kvhx NVARCHAR(36) COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI NOT NULL
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — links NO farm/property 5-tuple to Kvhx addresses. Bridge: (MunCode, FarmNr, UseNr, TenantNr, SectionNr) → Kvhx.
green_ai_note: Junction between Norwegian cadastral system and KVHX address system. Index on Kvhx. Not 1:1 — a property may have multiple addresses.

name: AddressImportNorwegianChange
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — queue of Norwegian Kartverket change events. ObjectType = what entity changed. ChangeType = INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE. Drives import fan-out per wiki partial-import proposal.
green_ai_note: Wiki proposes this as event queue: read → fan out to per-ObjectType handlers. ChangeNumber = sequential Kartverket ID. Wiki model name: AddressNorwegianChange.

name: AddressImportNorwegianBuilding
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian building staging. PreviousBuildingNumber/AffectedBuildingNumber track merges/splits.
green_ai_note: BuildingId (internal) vs BuildingNumber (Kartverket ID). Index on BuildingNumber INCLUDES BuildingTypeCode for door join queries.

name: AddressImportNorwegianAddress
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian address staging. AddressId = Kartverket UUID. Kvhx populated after processing. RepresentationPoint = spatial geography.
green_ai_note: ZipCodeNumber and StreetNumber are BIGINT FKs to import tables. PropertyNumber = FK to AddressImportNorwegianProperties. Indexes on Kvhx and PropertyNumber.

name: AddressImportNorwegianStreet
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian street staging. StreetCode nullable (may not be assigned yet for new streets).
green_ai_note: StreetNumber = Kartverket BIGINT ID. StreetCode = official INT street code (nullable for new entries).

name: AddressImportNorwegianZipCode
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian zip code staging. ZipCodeNumber = Kartverket ID, ZipCode = actual postal code.
green_ai_note: ZipCodeNumber (BIGINT Kartverket ID) distinct from ZipCode (INT postal code). City nullable.

name: AddressImportNorwegianOwner
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian owner staging. OwnershipCode = ownership type. PartNumerator/Denominator = fractional ownership. DateActiveFrom/Until = ownership period.
green_ai_note: Indexes optimized for status-driven processing: Status-only, PropertyNumber+Status, PropertyId+Status. PartNumerator/Denominator = legal ownership fraction (Norwegian cadastral law).

name: AddressImportNorwegianPerson
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian person/company owning properties. PersonNumber = fodselsnummer or org-nr. Type NVARCHAR(1) = P(erson) vs O(rg).
green_ai_note: Status DEFAULT 100 = unusual (active). PersonNumber may be sensitive (national ID). ZipCodeNumber BIGINT FK to AddressImportNorwegianZipCodes. AddressLine3 not in wiki model (added later).

name: AddressImportNorwegianProperty
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian property staging (Matrikkel data). 5-tuple cadastral key. Promoted to AddressNorwegianProperties after processing.
green_ai_note: PropertyNumber = Kartverket unique ID. 5-tuple: (MunCode, FarmNr, UseNr, TenantNr, SectionNr). Compound index on full 5-tuple.

name: AddressImportNorwegianPlot
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian plot/parcel staging with spatial Area polygon. Spatial index on Area.
green_ai_note: Spatial index SIX_*_Area. RepresentationPoint = centroid. PlotNumber = Matrikkel plot ID. Used for cadastral boundary / spatial containment.

name: AddressImportNorwegianPlotProperty
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — many-to-many: plots to properties. Composite PK (no IDENTITY). MainPlot = primary plot for the property.
green_ai_note: Composite PK only (no IDENTITY). Many-to-many: property spans multiple plots, plot contains multiple properties. MainPlot discriminates primary relationship.

name: AddressImportNorwegianDoor
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Norwegian door/unit staging. Links addresses to buildings. Kvhx populated after processing. FloorType NVARCHAR(1) + Floor INT = Norwegian floor encoding.
green_ai_note: Doors are sub-units (apartments). Heavily queried: indexes on AddressNumber, Status, Kvhx, PropertyNumber. Kvhx stored here after processing for traceability.

name: AddressImportFinnishBuilding
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Finnish building staging (AvoinData .7z CSV). Finnish+Swedish bilingual names required. Imported=0 = not yet promoted. WARNING: AvoinData shuts down Feb 2025 — replacement pending.
green_ai_note: Bilingual by Finnish law: AddressFinnish/AddressSwedish + street names in both languages. Source = which AvoinData batch. PageNumber = CSV page. AvoinData shutdown is active risk noted in wiki.

name: AddressImportFinnishZipCode
columns: ActiveSince DATETIME2(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT getdate()
layer_1_relevance: INCLUDE — Finnish zip codes with bilingual names. Both NOT NULL (required by law). Type INT = postal district category.
green_ai_note: FinnishName + SwedishName both NOT NULL — Finnish addresses bilingual by law. ActiveSince uses getdate() not getutcdate() (local time default — inconsistency with rest of system).
